name: whatsip.nl
description: whatsip.nl — a tiny, very fast what's-my-IP site (Cloudflare Pages + edge functions)

scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.manual-deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.test: npm run test:build && npm run test:html && npm run test:links && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:perf
